title: Further Supplementary Protocol between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Kingdom of Sweden, amending the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion, signed at London on 28 July 1960, as modified by the Protocol of 25 March 1966 and the Supplementary Protocol of 27 June 1968
subject: TAXATION
